meanings.definition: the organization that is the governing authority of a political unit
examples: the matter was referred to higher authorities

meanings.definition: the power or right to give orders or make decisions
examples: he has the authority to issue warrants
deputies are given authorization to make arrests
a place of potency in the state

meanings.definition: (usually plural) persons who exercise (administrative) control over others
examples: the authorities have issued a curfew

meanings.definition: an expert whose views are taken as definitive
examples: he is an authority on corporate law

meanings.definition: freedom from doubt; belief in yourself and your abilities
examples: his assurance in his superiority did not make him popular
after that failure he lost his confidence
authority for the program was renewed several times
this book is the final authority on the life of Milton
